title: 'Abd al -Malik and the Byzantines
description: In this year, the Byzantines arose and gathered an army against the Muslims in Syria. For fear of what he might do to the Muslims, `Abd al-Malik made peace with the Byzantine emperor, on terms that every Friday he would deliver a thousand dinars to him.606

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 21
